title: aquilegia vulgaris subsp. dichroa
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. dichroa, also known as the yellow columbine or golden-rimmed bellflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the buttercup family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. dichroa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
